message: Confidence tie on critical field 'name' for medical_devices::comparison_example::ORION-MEDICAL-COMPARISON_EXAMPLE-AZURE_SURESSCAN_VS_CONVENTIONAL_PACEMAKERS: existing='Azure SureScan vs Conventional Pacemakers Comparison' vs incoming='Azure SureScan vs Conventional Pacemakers' (both conf=0.0)

incoming_entity.name: Azure SureScan vs Conventional Pacemakers
incoming_entity.description: The Azure SureScan pacemaker addresses three risks during MRI that conventional pacemakers face: reed switch activation causing asynchronous pacing, lead tip heating causing thermal injury to myocardial tissue, and magnetic torque causing mechanical stress. Unlike conventional devices, the Azure SureScan has a controlled SureScan mode, filtered feedthrough, and specific device design to mitigate these risks.
